category_sources: source_facts.description says Rednex GameBoy Development System; official gbdev/rgbds README describes an assembler/linker package for Game Boy and Game Boy Color.
display_name_sources: Official gbdev/rgbds README uses RGBDS as the project title and expands it as Rednex Game Boy Development System.
docs_sources: Official gbdev/rgbds README says the toolchain documentation is available online; rgbds.gbdev.io is the homepage in source_facts.homepage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/gbdev/rgbds; per instruction, repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists assembler/linker tools; official README describes RGBASM, RGBLINK, RGBFIX, and RGBGFX for Game Boy development.
